title: Closed normative coverage schema (D35/AM-37)

rules.never_optional: The `coverage` field is NEVER optional and NEVER defaults to `verified`. blastRadius result always contains it.
rules.coverageUnknown_under_verified: Under `coverage: "verified"`, coverageUnknown lists exactly the weaver ids producing any consulted edge whose executed-state could not be confirmed.
rules.coverageUnknown_under_unverified: Under `coverage: "unverified"`, coverageUnknown conservatively contains EVERY consulted producer.
rules.empty_coverageUnknown_legality: coverageUnknown: [] is legal ONLY when coverage is "verified" AND the verified manifest proves every consulted producer `executed`. `unverified` with empty coverageUnknown while any producer was consulted is a test failure.
rules.closed_schema_rejection: A `coverage` value that is missing, not in the enum, or contradictory (e.g. unverified with empty coverageUnknown while producers were consulted) is a test failure; downstream consumers (flagship, reproduction) reject it.

non_claim: `coverage: "verified"` asserts the consulted producers executed at publication time (D34), NOT that Clotho covers every module JavaScript could reach.
change_rule: Changing the coverage schema requires a plan amendment (Daedalus), TELOS re-authorization, implementation review, and updated fixtures.

oracle.test: clotho/scripts/test-query.mjs (closed schema, coverageUnknown legality, contradictory-result rejection; assertCoverageSchema self-applied by threadsOf/blastRadius)
